visualizerParams.title: First Fibonacci with N Digits
visualizerParams.description: Find the index of the first term in the Fibonacci sequence to contain a specified number of digits.
visualizerParams.ghostCode:
def solution(n: int = 1000) -> int:
    """Returns the index of the first term in the Fibonacci sequence to contain n digits."""
    f1, f2 = 1, 1
    index = 2
    # The Fibonacci sequence starts F1=1, F2=1, F3=2...
    while True:
        f = f1 + f2
        f1, f2 = f2, f
        index += 1
        # Check number of digits by converting to string
        if len(str(f)) >= n:
            break
    return index


if __name__ == "__main__":
    n_digits = int(input("Enter number of digits: ").strip())
    print(solution(n_digits))
visualizerParams.finalCode:
def solution(n: int = 1000) -> int:
    """Returns the index of the first term in the Fibonacci sequence to contain n digits."""
    f1, f2 = 1, 1
    index = 2
    # The Fibonacci sequence starts F1=1, F2=1, F3=2...
    while True:
        f = f1 + f2
        f1, f2 = f2, f
        index += 1
        # Check number of digits by converting to string
        if len(str(f)) >= n:
            break
    return index


if __name__ == "__main__":
    n_digits = int(input("Enter number of digits: ").strip())
    print(solution(n_digits))
